pokemon:spidops.name: Spidops
pokemon:spidops.summary: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.
Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

pokemon:tarountula.name: Tarountula
pokemon:tarountula.summary: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread’s strength is the topic of ongoing research.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.
